title: Bad Blood
why_this_song: Bad Blood by Taylor Swift (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "blood" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: 'Cause baby, now we got bad blood
So take a look what you've done
You made a really deep cut

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Bad Blood" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Bad Blood"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Taylor Swift one question about "Bad Blood", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Taylor Swift sobre "Bad Blood", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Bad Blood" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Bad Blood" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
